creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

commit 7e253dac6be16d4888f37cff91f50589d6018721
Author:     Torsten Zuehlsdorff <tz@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2024-07-10 09:40:50 +0000
Commit:     Torsten Zuehlsdorff <tz@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2024-07-10 09:40:50 +0000

    net-p2p/readarr: Upgrade from 0.3.29.2565 to 0.3.30.2576

      Changelog:

        * Fixed: Already imported downloads appearing in Queue briefly [ #3538 ]
        * Bump mac image to 12
        * New: Ignore Deluge torrents without a title
        * Fixed: Exclude invalid releases from Newznab and Torznab parsers
        * Bump ws from 7.5.9 to 7.5.10
        * Bump version to 0.3.30

      Taken from:
        https://github.com/Readarr/Readarr/releases/tag/v0.3.30.2576

    PR:             280198
    Approved by:    Michiel van Baak Jansen <michiel@vanbaak.eu> (maintainer)
